- Logistics & Warehousing: Recruiting for roles such as warehouse associates, logistics coordinators, and forklift operators.
- Information Technology: Connecting companies with IT specialists, software developers, and data analysts.
- Construction: Staffing for various trades, project managers, and skilled laborers.
- Hospitality: Offering staffing solutions for hotels, restaurants, and catering services.
- Administrative Support: Providing skilled administrative personnel for various business needs.

 Same Day Pay for Employees:
One of the standout features of QuickHIre Staffing is our Same Day Pay program. We understand the importance of financial stability for our employees and recognize that unexpected expenses can arise at any time. With our Same Day Pay feature, eligible employees have the flexibility to receive their pay on the same day they work, allowing them to manage their finances more effectively.

At QuickHIre Staffing, our commitment to both our clients and employees drives us to provide exceptional service and innovative solutions in the staffing landscape. Through our extensive network and focused recruitment strategies, we are dedicated to meeting the unique staffing needs across various industries while ensuring our workforce is supported with flexible payment options.

title: 3402 Systems Requirements Engineer ADV
description_text:
ALTEN Mexico is a subsidiary of ALTEN Group. ALTEN group has been a leader in engineering and information technology for more than 30 years and operates in 30 countries across Europe, North America, Asia, Africa, and the Middle East and employs more than 46,000 people, 88% of whom are engineers.
We are looking for Systems Requirements Engineer ADV:
Intermediate System Requirements Engineer – Infotainment Subsystem
Acts as the key liaison between Design & Release Engineers (DREs) and System Architects, ensuring that technical and regulatory needs are translated into clear, specific, and actionable requirements for the design, development, validation, and release of vehicle electrical and electronic components.
Utilizes Requirements Engineering methodologies to elicit, analyze, document, and maintain system requirements. Experienced in specialized tools such as IBM DOORS for requirements management, IBM Engineering Workflow Management (RTC) for workflow control, and JIRA for issue tracking.
Collaborates closely in system design and development, actively participating in the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC). Applies analytical methods such as DFMEA to ensure the quality and reliability of the infotainment system, including the integration of advanced technologies such as Apple CarPlay and Android Auto.
Activities:
1. Requirements Definition & Management
Write, update, and maintain technical requirements for the Infotainment subsystem (and Cabin Thermal & Safety, as applicable) throughout production phases. 
Conduct requirements elicitation through stakeholder interviews and workshops. 
Utilize IBM DOORS for requirements management and traceability. 
2. Systems Analysis & Design
Perform system requirements analysis using established engineering methodologies. 
Collaborate in the design and development of infotainment hardware and software systems. 
Support system modeling and architecture activities. 
3. Technical Coordination & Liaison
Act as the key link between Design & Release Engineers (DREs) and System Architects. 
Work cross-functionally with multidisciplinary engineering teams to ensure correct hardware–software integration. 
4. Diagnostics & Troubleshooting
Identify, analyze, and resolve hardware and software system failures. 
Apply diagnostic tools to detect and address technical issues. 
5. Project Tracking & Workflow Control
Use IBM Engineering Workflow Management (RTC) and JIRA to manage workflows, tasks, and issue tracking. 
Contribute to the complete Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) for infotainment components. 
6. Quality Assurance & Risk Analysis
Conduct thorough testing to validate system functionality and reliability. 
Perform DFMEA to identify and mitigate potential design risks. 
7. Technical Documentation
Create and maintain detailed records of diagnosed issues, implemented solutions, and established requirements. 
Prepare and update technical documentation, including specifications and reports.
University Degree (Bachelor’s or Engineering) in related fields such as: Mechatronics Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Computer Systems Engineering, Software Engineering, Telecommunications Engineering
Requirements Engineering: Intermediate level (5–8 years of experience in definition, management, and elicitation of requirements). 
Requirements Management with IBM DOORS: Intermediate level (5–8 years of experience). 
Workflow Control with IBM Engineering Workflow Management (RTC): Intermediate level (5 years of experience). 
Issue Tracking with JIRA: Intermediate level (4–6 years of experience). 
Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC): Intermediate level (5-8 years of experience). 
Diagnostics and Troubleshooting (HW/SW): Intermediate level (5–8 years of experience). 
Systems Engineering Methodologies: Intermediate level (5–8 years of experience). 
Vehicle Communication Protocols (CAN, LIN): Intermediate level (5–8 years of experience). 
Embedded Systems Knowledge: Intermediate level (5–8 years of experience). 
DFMEA Analysis: Basic to Intermediate level (5–8 years of experience).
Design for Six Sigma (DFSS): Basic to Intermediate level (5–8 years of experience). 
CATIA V5: Basic level (2-4 years of experience in model visualization or review). 
Knowledge of Apple CarPlay / Android Auto: Intermediate level (3–4 years of experience in integration or validation). 
Programming Languages (Python, C/C++): Basic level (3–4 years of experience for scripting or automation). 
Knowledge of Vehicle Safety Regulations: Basic level (3–4 years of experience). 
Competitive salary
Above-law benefits 
Career growth and development plan
Remote work scheme
Support for home office setup
ai_core_responsibilities: The Systems Requirements Engineer acts as a liaison between Design & Release Engineers and System Architects, translating technical and regulatory needs into actionable requirements. They are involved in the entire Software Development Life Cycle, ensuring quality and reliability of the infotainment system.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a university degree in related fields and intermediate experience in requirements definition, management, and elicitation. Proficiency in tools like IBM DOORS and JIRA, as well as knowledge of vehicle communication protocols and embedded systems, is essential.

title: Brand Production Designer
description_text:
We are building a parenting culture rooted in confidence, not comparison — starting with how families choose to feed their babies. Our European-style infant formula is crafted with intentionally sourced, organic ingredients, giving parents a product they feel proud to feed their babies, delivered directly to their doorstep. The formula is uniquely designed to meet both U.S. FDA and EU standards.
Although the majority of parents use formula during their baby’s first year, many feel unnecessary stigma for not exclusively breastfeeding. Founded by mothers and developed alongside scientists, nutritionists, pediatricians, and lactation consultants, the team understands firsthand that feeding is not one-size-fits-all. Our mission is to empower parents to feed their babies with confidence.
The Role
We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Brand Production Designer to support our Creative Studio within the Brand & Marketing organization. Reporting to the Art Lead, this role focuses on executing branded materials and putting the final polish on creative projects.
This position is ideal for a collaborative team player and creative problem-solver who obsesses over quality in a fast-paced environment.
What You Will Do
Support the Brand Design team by executing design deliverables across all owned and paid channels (paid media, organic, email, landing pages, etc.) 
Work closely with the Creative Studio and Marketing team in a highly collaborative, fast-moving environment 
Champion visual consistency and high-quality execution to strengthen brand recognition and loyalty 
Collaborate with the Growth team to deliver assets that support lifecycle marketing and paid initiatives 
Partner with Platform and Product teams to maintain a cohesive brand experience across Brand, Marketing, and Product 
Review project briefs and requirements, delivering final designs that meet creative and technical standards 
Prepare supplied artwork in multiple formats for production and resolve issues that arise during execution 
Manage priorities across multiple projects while delivering detailed assets on time using internal asset management systems (e.g., Google Drive, Asana) 
Values That Guide the Team
Be Bold: Challenge norms, break rules thoughtfully, and use creativity as a force for positive change 
Embrace Healthy Tension: Stay curious, practice humility, and learn through uncertainty 
Deliver with Care: Sweat the details so customers don’t have to 
Don’t Assume: Celebrate diverse perspectives and honor the unique paths that bring people together 
Commitment to Inclusion
We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive workplace where everyone feels they belong. We believe people do their best work when they can show up as their authentic selves every day.
Bachelor’s degree in Design or a related field, with 3+ years of experience in an agency, in-house, or startup environment 
Fluency in Figma, Adobe Creative Suite (InDesign, Illustrator, Photoshop), and Google Workspace 
A strong portfolio demonstrating range, scale, and a refined visual aesthetic 
Solid understanding of typography, layout, and composition 
Highly collaborative team player who can also work independently, prioritize effectively, and iterate quickly 
Strong design thinking and execution skills with close attention to detail 
Experience managing multiple projects in a fast-paced environment 
Clear communication, presentation, and organizational skills 
Comfort participating in constructive design critiques and incorporating feedback
ai_core_responsibilities: The Brand Production Designer will support the Brand Design team by executing design deliverables across various channels and ensuring high-quality execution. They will collaborate with multiple teams to maintain a cohesive brand experience and manage project priorities effectively.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a bachelor's degree in Design or a related field and at least 3 years of experience in a relevant environment. Proficiency in design tools and a strong portfolio demonstrating design skills are essential.

title: Full-Stack Engineer - A285
description_text:
Industry
SaaS / AI / Voice Technology
Work Arrangement
Remote (EST)
Job Type
Full-time
Work Schedule
Standard business hours - US Eastern Time (EST)
Locations:
Anywhere Remote
About Pearl Talent
Pearl works with the top 1% of candidates from around the world and connects them with the best startups in the US and EU. Our clients have raised over $5B in aggregate and are backed by companies like OpenAI, a16z, and Founders Fund. They’re looking for the sharpest, hungriest candidates who they can consistently promote and work with over many years. Candidates we’ve hired have been flown out to the US and EU to work with their clients, and even promoted to roles that match folks onshore in the US.
Hear why we exist, what we believe in, and who we’re building for: WATCH HERE
Why Work with Us?
At Pearl, we’re not just another recruiting firm—we connect you with exceptional opportunities to work alongside visionary US and EU founders. Our focus is on placing you in roles where you can grow, be challenged, and build long-term, meaningful careers.
About the Company
Our client is building an AI-powered voice receptionist platform for real-world B2B operations. The product manages inbound calls, booking workflows, pricing rules, and payments for service-based businesses. Currently in pilot phase, the platform is preparing for broader rollout. The engineering team is intentionally small, senior-leaning, and values execution quality, ownership, and practical problem-solving over heavy process.
Role Overview
We are looking for a hands-on Full-Stack Engineer to translate loosely defined product requirements into production-ready features. You will work closely with the CTO and a small engineering team to improve platform reliability, execution velocity, and code quality. This role is ideal for candidates who thrive in ambiguous, fast-paced environments, enjoy ownership, and take pride in shipping features that customers actively use. The work is cross-functional, execution-heavy, and requires strong problem-solving and practical implementation skills.
Your Impact
Deliver high-quality features from concept to production with minimal oversight. 
Contribute directly to platform stability, reducing issues in active customer pilots. 
Improve overall code quality, maintainability, and execution efficiency. 
Support real customer workflows by integrating AI and voice logic reliably. 
Enhance operational processes and backend/frontend integration across the platform.
Core Responsibilities
Engineering Execution & Ownership – 40%
Translate high-level product requirements into technical designs and actionable Jira tickets. 
Own features end-to-end, delivering clean, maintainable production code. 
Review pull requests and enforce high code quality standards. 
Document technical decisions and communicate trade-offs clearly. 
Backend-Focused Full-Stack Development – 30%
Build and maintain backend services using Python and modern frameworks (FastAPI-style). 
Design and evolve relational database schemas and migrations. 
Contribute to internal frontend features using React / Next.js as needed. 
AI & Voice Workflow Integration – 20%
Implement real customer workflows using AI and voice tools. 
Connect LLM behavior, prompts, and tool logic to application code. 
Focus on reliability, correctness, and production-ready implementation rather than experimental research. 
Infrastructure & Integrations – 5%
Support application deployment and operational reliability. 
Contribute incremental improvements to existing infrastructure (e.g., Vercel). 
Integrate and maintain third-party services such as voice providers and payment systems. 
Pilot Support & Stabilization – 5%
Triage issues from active customer pilots. 
Identify whether issues stem from product gaps or engineering defects. 
Stabilize pilot workflows while the core platform continues evolving.
Must-Haves (Required)
3+ years of professional software engineering experience. 
Proven ability to own ambiguous problems and deliver production-ready solutions. 
Experience shipping and maintaining live production systems. 
Strong proficiency in Python and modern backend frameworks (e.g., FastAPI). 
Experience with relational databases and schema evolution. 
Knowledge of modern frontend frameworks (React or similar). 
Excellent written communication and ability to document decisions clearly. 
High learning agility with an execution-oriented mindset.
Nice-to-Haves (Preferred)
Experience supporting early-stage products or live customer pilots. 
Familiarity with cloud infrastructure (AWS or similar). 
Exposure to LLM-powered features, AI agents, or voice-based applications. 
Experience integrating with third-party or enterprise systems.
Tools ProficiencyMust-Haves (Required)
Python, FastAPI, React, Next.js, Jira
Nice-to-Haves (Preferred)
AWS, Vercel, AI/voice tooling, relational databases, Git
Competitive Salary: Based on experience and skills 
Remote Work: Fully remote—work from anywhere 
Performance Bonus: Based on data accuracy, reporting timeliness, and overall sales efficiency
Team Incentives: Recognition for maintaining 100% CRM hygiene and on-time reporting
Generous PTO: In accordance with company policy 
Health Coverage for PH-based talents: HMO coverage after 3 months for full-time employees 
Direct Mentorship: Guidance from international industry experts 
Learning & Development: Ongoing access to resources for professional growth 
Global Networking: Connect with professionals worldwide 
Our Recruitment Process
Application 
Screening 
Skills Assessment 
Top-grading Interview 
Client Interview 
Job Offer 
Client Onboarding
Ready to Join Us?
If this role aligns with your skills and goals, apply now to take the next step in your journey with Pearl.

title: 55624154765 - Digital Designer, Brand Creative
description_text:
About the Role
We are looking for a versatile Brand Designer to join a fast-paced Brand Creative team. This role is ideal for a proactive self-starter with strong time management skills who can produce compelling, cohesive assets across multiple channels.
You will manage the day-to-day flow of creative requests from various stakeholders, balancing multiple projects at once — often with tight deadlines and evolving priorities — while ensuring all work aligns with brand standards.
What You’ll DoCreative Production
Design branded assets including digital ads and email communications 
Produce performance-driven creative while maintaining strong brand storytelling 
Ensure visual consistency across all platforms and touchpoints 
Collaboration
Partner closely with the Copy team to bring on-brand messaging to life 
Work with the broader Brand Creative team to maintain design consistency and improve workflows 
Adapt and refine work based on feedback from cross-functional stakeholders 
Project Management
Manage intake and prioritize multiple simultaneous projects 
Deliver high-quality assets on time while adhering to brand guidelines and design specifications 
Stay organized in a fast-moving, deadline-driven environment 
What We’re Looking For
Highly organized and adaptable in a fast-paced workflow 
A versatile designer with experience creating performance-focused assets across platforms 
Strong communicator who understands prioritization and managing stakeholder expectations 
Skilled in typography, design systems, and visual storytelling 
Equally comfortable refining high-volume performance creative and contributing to larger brand initiatives 
Professional, positive, and collaborative in team environments 
Minimum Qualifications
3+ years of experience at a creative agency or design-led consumer brand 
Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and Figma 
Working knowledge of After Effects and Premiere for light video editing and motion text 
Strong portfolio demonstrating a refined aesthetic and brand consistency 
Ability to thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced environment

title: 55389620329 - Deck Designer
description_text:
We are looking for an exceptional Deck Designer who specializes in Brand Storytelling, Business Strategy, and big-idea presentations. This role is for someone who understands that great decks don’t just look impressive — they clarify thinking, influence decisions, and help ideas get funded and approved.
You’ll transform complex ideas into clean, compelling, executive-ready presentations that balance narrative, structure, and standout design. If you thrive in fast-moving, idea-driven environments and know how to make slides both beautiful and persuasive, this role is for you.
What You’ll Do
Presentation & Visual Storytelling
Design high-impact strategy, pitch, and executive-level decks 
Turn rough outlines, brainstorms, and early concepts into polished presentations 
Create slides that balance storytelling, data, and visual clarity 
Develop diagrams, frameworks, charts, and visual systems that make complex ideas instantly understandable 
Design Excellence
Craft visually strong layouts with excellent use of typography, hierarchy, spacing, and color 
Ensure every slide supports the narrative flow and builds toward a clear conclusion 
Maintain consistency across presentations while elevating overall visual standards 
Collaboration & Iteration
Partner closely with strategists, writers, and leadership to shape deck narratives 
Translate abstract or ambiguous ideas into structured visual stories 
Iterate quickly based on feedback while contributing strong creative direction 
Help evolve internal deck templates, standards, and visual systems 
What We’re Looking For
Proven experience designing strategy decks, pitch decks, or executive presentations 
Exceptional visual taste and attention to design fundamentals 
Strong storytelling instincts — you understand pacing, narrative build, and slide flow 
Expert proficiency in PowerPoint, Google Slides, Keynote, or Figma 
Experience designing for senior audiences (executives, founders, investors) 
Comfortable working in fast-paced, ambiguous environments 
Detail-oriented but efficient — able to balance quality with speed 
Nice to Have
Experience working with AI, technology, or innovation-driven brands 
Ability to add light motion, animations, or transitions that enhance clarity (not distraction) 
Strong understanding of branding and adapting decks across visual identities 
Experience transforming unclear or messy thinking into clear, structured narratives
ai_core_responsibilities: The Deck Designer will create high-impact strategy and executive-level presentations, transforming complex ideas into clear visual stories. They will collaborate with strategists and leadership to ensure that each presentation effectively communicates the intended narrative.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have proven experience in designing strategy and pitch decks, with exceptional visual taste and storytelling instincts. Proficiency in presentation software and experience working with senior audiences are also required.

title: Senior Backend Developer
description_text:
We are seeking an experienced Senior Backend Developer to support a U.S.-based organization in building, maintaining, and optimizing scalable backend systems. This role is ideal for someone with strong database expertise, solid backend frameworks experience, and a proactive mindset focused on performance, security, and reliability.
Duties / Tasks to perform
Design, optimize, and maintain relational database structures, including indexing and query performance tuning 
Develop and maintain backend services using Python and Django / Django REST Framework 
Work with PostgreSQL databases to ensure data integrity and scalability 
Implement logging and monitoring solutions using the ELK stack 
Support containerized environments using Docker 
Collaborate on cloud-based infrastructure with AWS (general working knowledge required) 
Apply encryption and authentication best practices to ensure application security 
Support asynchronous processing and background tasks (Redis, Celery – plus) 
Contribute to real-time features using WebSockets (nice to have)
Strong experience with SQL and relational database design 
Advanced proficiency in Python 
Hands-on experience with Django and Django REST Framework 
Solid understanding of PostgreSQL 
Experience with logging and monitoring tools (ELK stack) 
Working knowledge of Docker-based environments 
Familiarity with cloud infrastructure concepts (AWS) 
Knowledge of encryption, authentication, and security best practices 
Strong attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines 
Professional proficiency in English; Spanish is a plus
Schedule: Monday to Friday, 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM (GMT -5, Eastern Time – US & Canada)
Competitive pay in US Dollars.
You'll get to work with some amazing, respected business professionals.
We really value and encourage input from our team members.
We offer different payment methods (Zelle, Face Bank, Binance)
You'll get paid every two weeks.
Birthday and work anniversary celebrations.
Alliances with many brands grant extra benefits to freelancers.
Weekly recreation dynamics that foster a healthy work environment.

At Freelance Latin America, we’re excited to connect you with meaningful remote opportunities. However, we want to be clear:

Consistent availability is expected. You will have a set work schedule determined by the client, and you are expected to be present during those hours.
🤝 You will be part of the client’s team.
You’ll follow their company guidelines, communication practices, and workflows, ensuring seamless collaboration.
📈 KPIs and goals matter.
Your performance will be measured to ensure alignment with client expectations and project objectives.

You might need to complete training to fully understand your role, tools, and client processes.
🎯 Commitment and responsibility are essential.
We work with clients who rely on your dedication to deliver consistent, high-quality results. This is key to building trust and long-term partnerships.
🚀 Ready to grow your career with us?
Apply only if you are ready to commit, learn, and take ownership of your role.

title: Spanish Speaking Customer Care for E-Commerce Platform in Greece - Fully Paid
description_text:
Mercier Consultancy MD is excited to offer an excellent opportunity for Spanish Speaking Customer Service Representatives for a leading E-Commerce Platform, with the chance to work in Greece. This role is perfect for individuals who have a keen interest in online shopping and a dedication to providing outstanding customer support. As a representative, you will assist customers in Spanish, resolving their inquiries and enhancing their overall shopping experience.

Key Responsibilities
Handle customer inquiries related to product orders, shipping, returns, and account management via phone, email, and chat in Spanish.
Provide accurate information about products, pricing, promotions, and delivery options.
Assist customers with order modifications, cancellations, and troubleshooting issues with the e-commerce platform.
Resolve customer complaints and ensure a high level of satisfaction through effective problem-solving.
Document all customer interactions and feedback in the CRM system for tracking and follow-up.
Collaborate with various departments, including logistics and sales, to improve customer service delivery.
Stay informed about product updates and promotions to provide timely assistance to customers.
Fluency in Spanish (both written and spoken) is essential; knowledge of English is beneficial.
Previous experience in customer service, particularly in the e-commerce or retail sector, is preferred.
Strong communication skills and a friendly, approachable demeanor.
Ability to handle inquiries and complaints efficiently while maintaining professionalism.
Excellent organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.
Familiarity with e-commerce platforms and customer relationship management (CRM) systems is desirable.
Willingness to work flexible hours, including weekends and holidays as needed.
Relocation to Greece is required for this position.
Competitive Monthly Salary
2 Extra Salaries Per Year
Fully Paid Relocation Package
Fully Paid Training
Health Insurance
And Much More...
ai_core_responsibilities: Customer service representatives will handle inquiries related to product orders, shipping, returns, and account management in Spanish. They will also resolve complaints and document interactions in the CRM system.
ai_requirements_summary: Fluency in Spanish is essential, and previous customer service experience, particularly in e-commerce, is preferred. Strong communication skills and the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment are also required.

Telecom domain experience (preferred, not mandatory)

title: 54956752259- Senior Amazon Ads Manager
description_text:
About the Role
We are seeking a Senior Amazon Ads Manager who lives and breathes Amazon advertising. As the most experienced ads specialist on the team, you will own campaign strategy, execution, and performance optimization across multiple client accounts.
This is a results-driven role focused on maximizing performance, hitting KPIs, and scaling profitable growth while maintaining budget efficiency. You will also act as the internal subject-matter expert on Amazon advertising, staying ahead of platform trends, beta opportunities, and evolving best practices.
Strong communication skills are essential, as this role includes daily client interaction via Slack and leading weekly performance meetings.
Key Responsibilities
Campaign Management & Optimization
Conduct in-depth keyword research to identify growth opportunities 
Build, launch, and continuously refine campaigns aligned with client KPIs 
Manage and optimize advertising budgets across multiple accounts 
Use third-party tools to improve efficiency and performance visibility 
Set up and manage deals, coupons, and promotional campaigns 
Test new campaign types, creative formats, and keyword strategies 
Make data-driven decisions on bidding, budgeting, and targeting 
Analyze performance to identify inefficiencies and scale winning strategies
Account Health & Operational Awareness
Understand how account health metrics impact advertising success 
Identify operational issues (suppressed listings, inventory constraints, policy violations) that affect ad performance 
Collaborate with operations teams to resolve issues impacting campaigns 
Communicate risks and operational blockers to clients and internal stakeholders 
Client Communication & Reporting
Serve as the primary client contact for advertising performance 
Maintain regular communication via Slack 
Lead weekly internal and client-facing performance reviews 
Translate advertising data into clear business insights 
Provide performance updates and strategic recommendations to leadership 
Ensure accountability and alignment across all deliverables 
Cross-Functional Collaboration
Work closely with catalog, creative, and inventory teams to align strategy 
Coordinate with internal stakeholders to deliver cohesive client growth plans 
Qualifications
Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience managing Amazon Ads campaigns 
Experience working with CPG brands and understanding category dynamics 
Proven track record managing $5M+ in total ad spend 
Deep expertise in Amazon ad formats, tools, and optimization strategies 
Strong understanding of Amazon Seller Central / Amazon Vendor Central operations and how account health impacts ads 
Experience with third-party Amazon advertising software 
Strong grasp of digital advertising fundamentals (attribution, funnel stages, audience strategy) 
Highly analytical and performance-oriented 
Excellent written and verbal communication skills 
Comfortable leading meetings and presenting performance insights 
Self-motivated and effective in a remote environment
ai_core_responsibilities: The Senior Amazon Ads Manager will own campaign strategy, execution, and performance optimization across multiple client accounts. This role includes daily client interaction and leading weekly performance meetings.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience managing Amazon Ads campaigns and a proven track record managing over $5M in total ad spend. Strong expertise in Amazon ad formats and tools, along with excellent communication skills, are essential.

title: Recruiter (Skilled Nursing - US Healthcare) - EST Hrs (Remote)
description_text:
ISTA Personnel Solutions is a dynamic and fast-growing BPO company. We are not a recruitment agency - we operate as a dedicated extension of our clients’ teams, delivering high-quality service with precision, efficiency, and a personal touch.
Join our team as a Recruiter in the Healthcare industry, where you’ll play a key role in identifying, engaging, and onboarding top talent. This is an active, hands-on recruiting role that requires strong organization, excellent communication, and consistent follow-through. You will work closely with candidates and internal stakeholders to ensure a smooth, professional recruitment experience while helping facilities secure the talent needed to deliver exceptional patient care.
PLEASE NOTE:
Working Hours: Monday – Friday | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST (4:00 PM – 1:00 AM South African time – subject to change in accordance with daylight savings in the United States as well as the operational requirements of the Company).
You will be required to work on both South African and U.S. public holidays (compensation for SA public holidays in accordance with the BCEA).
Internet Requirements: A fixed fibre line with a minimum speed of 25 Mbps (upload & download) and the ability to support a wired Ethernet connection is mandatory. Applicants without a fixed fibre line cannot be considered.
Power Backup: A reliable power backup solution is required to manage load shedding and power outages. Applicants without a power backup cannot be considered.
Work Environment: This is a fully remote working role.
Job Responsibilities (but not limited to):
Source, screen, and engage candidates for Skilled Nursing Facility roles across the U.S. 
Conduct phone screenings and maintain ongoing communication with candidates throughout the recruitment process. 
Coordinate interview scheduling and follow-ups with candidates and internal teams. 
Maintain accurate and up-to-date candidate records within the ATS or tracking systems. 
Communicate professionally and clearly with candidates to ensure a positive recruitment experience. 
Manage multiple open roles while meeting recruitment timelines and priorities.

title: Operations Excellence Manager
description_text:
We are seeking an Operations Excellence Manager to reduce customer claims and improve operational quality across Jiffy’s three product lines: Blanks, Transfers, and Print. This role will partner closely with Customer Service to categorize claims, analyze trends, and identify responsible parties and root causes. The manager will apply structured problem-solving frameworks (e.g., 5 Whys, Pareto analysis) to drive corrective and preventive actions, ensuring issues are resolved and do not reoccur. A key responsibility will also be to collaborate with Operations and Technology teams to define requirements for claims categorization tools, automated root cause tracking, and quality dashboards that enhance visibility and accelerate resolution.
This role follows a hybrid work model with a requirement of a minimum of three (3) days per week onsite. Employees should expect to work regularly from the office to support collaboration and business needs.
Key Responsibilities
Partner with Customer Service to analyze customer claims, categorize issues, and link them to responsible parties and root causes.
Conduct structured root cause analysis using frameworks such as the 5 Whys and Pareto analysis, and define corrective and preventive actions.
Collaborate with Operations teams (Blanks, Printing, Logistics, Supply Chain) to ensure corrective actions are implemented, tracked, and sustained.
Work with Product and Engineering teams to define requirements for tools and dashboards that enable claims categorization, automated RCA tracking, and quality monitoring.
Develop and maintain quality dashboards and reporting to provide visibility into claim trends and progress on corrective actions.
Drive continuous improvement initiatives to reduce claim frequency, improve quality, and enhance customer experience.
Communicate findings and action plans to leadership, ensuring alignment and accountability across teams.
Basic Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Operations Management, Supply Chain, Business Administration, or a related field.
5–8 years of experience in operations, quality, or customer success/experience roles.
Background in claims management, customer issue resolution, or quality systems.
Strong analytical skills with demonstrated ability to translate customer issues into operational improvements.
Proficiency with root cause analysis and corrective action frameworks (e.g., 5 Whys, Pareto analysis).
Experience collaborating with software/product teams to define data and tooling requirements.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with ability to influence across functions.
Understanding of e-commerce, printing, or consumer goods fulfillment operations is highly valuable.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience designing or implementing claims dashboards, categorization workflows, or RCA tools.
Proven ability to work seamlessly across Customer Service and Operations teams.
Advanced degree or certification in Quality, Operations, or related field (e.g., Six Sigma, Lean).
Why You Will Love Working At Jiffy
Opportunity to grow company market share through innovation in the rapidly evolving e-commerce, AI, and image processing space.
Thrive in a collaborative, high-growth environment where your ideas directly influence how Jiffy evolves as a leading e-commerce destination.
High visibility and influence in solving complex problems and delivering cutting edge solutions resulting in direct impact on Jiffy’s seamless customer experience.
Access to career development opportunities in a company that invests deeply in professional growth.
What We Offer
The base compensation for this role is expected to range from $135,000 to $165,000 per year. Actual compensation will be based on a variety of factors, including skills, experience, qualifications, and overall fit for the role.

Total compensation may include base salary, performance-based bonuses, equity, and benefits. Final offers are tailored to each candidate and take into consideration their background and years of experience.
Comprehensive Benefits: Full medical, dental, and vision coverage, with a portion of premiums paid by Jiffy.
Retirement Planning: 401(k)
Wellness Support: Annual wellness benefits to help you stay healthy and balanced.
Tools for Success: Choice of MacBook or PC laptop, plus equipment for your home office setup.
Perks & Extras: Annual credit of $200 to use on our website plus more team merch drops than you will know what to do with!
Professional Development: Annual stipend to support your learning and career growth.
EEO
Jiffy is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate in hiring or any employment decision based on race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), marital status, ancestry, physical or mental disability, genetic information, veteran status, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. Jiffy considers qualified applicants with criminal histories, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law. Jiffy is also committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Operations Excellence Manager will analyze customer claims, categorize issues, and identify root causes to drive corrective actions. They will collaborate with various teams to implement and sustain improvements in operational quality.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have a bachelor's degree in a relevant field and 5-8 years of experience in operations or quality roles. Strong analytical skills and experience with root cause analysis frameworks are essential.
linkedin_org_locations: Whitby, Ontario, CA
linkedin_org_description:
Jiffy.com is the #1 US online reseller of blank imprintable clothing. We launched over a decade ago with a clear mission: Use technology to combine an unparalleled level of customer service with the fastest delivery the blank apparel industry has ever seen.

Today, our team helps millions of creators, makers, and entrepreneurs bring their ideas to life with quality products and the materials to express their craft and grow their own businesses. Our focus on providing superior value and customer service remains as strong as ever. We’re continually delighted and inspired by the success of our customers! Visit us at jiffy.com.

title: Housekeeper
description_text:
This role pays £12.60 per hour
This vacancy is for 14.5 hours per week, including every other weekend.
As Housekeeping Assistant you will assist the Head Housekeeper/Front of House Manager to maintain the highest standard of cleanliness, hygiene and comfort for customers within all village facilities and households.
You will be expected to:
Deliver domestic services in a manner that upholds the core values of Belong and in accordance with organisational requirements to ensure the health, safety and wellbeing of customers, team members and other visiting members of the community that Belong serves.
Respond to the needs of individual customers for domestic support to enable them to maintain their household accommodation.
Assist the team by responding to requests for assistance with any aspect of housekeeping including cleaning and laundry tasks.
Demonstrates qualities to deliver Belong vision and values.
Communicates clearly and has a professional manner.
Works independently and as part of team to ensure the customer’s needs are met and team goals are achieved.
Prioritises tasks and completes to the required standard and in a timely manner.
Able to undertake moving & handling of loads, which may involve using specialist equipment.
Able to undertake housekeeping tasks including cleaning and laundry using relevant equipment.
Able to complete written work records.
Good customer care focus with a desire to serve others.
An awareness of Health and Safety requirements and how to follow product safety advice sheets and procedures.
Reliable and able to fulfil contracted hours and work patterns e.g. days, evenings, weekends.
Diploma/NVQ 2 in Cleaning & Building Interiors or equivalent (Essential or working/prepared to work towards).
Experience of previous commercial or domestic cleaning/ laundry.
Paid DBS*
Enhanced pay for Bank Holidays
Access to an Early Pay Scheme
Free Blue Light Card
Every other weekend off
Medi cash
Enhanced Colleague Referral Scheme
Death in Service payment to a beneficiary of your choosing
Paid induction (3 days 9am to 4.30pm) & paid training on site
Subsidised meals in our Bistro
Access to Employment Assistance programme
o Confidential Counselling, Mental Health, Finance support
Full PPE and LFT & PCR tests provided on site
Access to Gain a NVQ
Career Progression
Auto Enrolment pension
Free Wi-Fi
Full Support, shadow shifts and training
*DBS as per our terms and condition
As part of our recruitment process you will be required to complete an Enhanced DBS check. Their code of conduct can be found on the following link that you can copy and post to your web browser if you wish to read:
https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/dbs-code-of-practice
We welcome applications from eligible applicants; it is with regret that we do not have the facility to sponsor overseas staff
ai_benefits: Access to an Early Pay Scheme
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Housekeeping Assistant, you will assist in maintaining cleanliness and hygiene standards across village facilities. You will respond to customer needs for domestic support and assist with cleaning and laundry tasks.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a Diploma/NVQ 2 in Cleaning & Building Interiors or equivalent and experience in commercial or domestic cleaning. An awareness of health and safety requirements is essential.
linkedin_org_slogan: Magnificent care in a magnificent setting
linkedin_org_locations: Pepper House, Market Street, Nantwich, Cheshire, CW5 5DQ, GB
linkedin_org_description:
Belong is a not-for-profit provider with a long history of caring and specific expertise in supporting people with dementia.
 
Belong villages offer stylish independent living apartments or 24 hour care in village households. 

To find out more, visit www.belong.org.uk


Your Life, your pace, your way.

title: Full Stack Software Engineer
description_text:
We’re looking for a Full Stack Software Engineer to help build and maintain an AI-native product used by real customers in complex, high-stakes environments. This role is product-focused and execution-heavy, ideal for an engineer who enjoys shipping features, fixing real-world issues, and improving systems that people depend on daily.
You will work on a mix of new feature development and ongoing product maintenance, supporting an AI-powered platform that turns scattered organizational knowledge into usable, structured answers. You will not be operating in a vacuum. Designs, direction, and architectural guidance already exist. Your job is to help turn that into reliable, scalable product functionality.
If you enjoy full-stack work, moving quickly with clear direction, and contributing to a meaningful AI product without reinventing everything from scratch, this role is a strong fit.
Why You’ll Want to Join
You will be paid in USD (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)
Up to 14 days of Paid Time Off annually (starting Day 1)
Observance of Holidays per company guidelines
100% remote setup so you can work wherever you’re most productive
Work on a real AI product serving government and enterprise customers
Clear scope, strong technical guidance, and product-driven priorities
Opportunity to grow as a product engineer inside an AI-first company
What You’ll Work OnFull-Stack Product Development
Build and ship full-stack features for an AI-native platform
Implement product designs using React and TypeScript on the front end
Develop and maintain backend services using Node.js
Work within existing architecture while contributing clean, maintainable code
Turn well-defined requirements into working product features efficiently
Maintenance and Product Hardening
Fix bugs and address issues in existing production systems
Improve configurability and self-service capabilities for customers
Support updates and refinements required for ongoing customer use
Help keep the platform stable, reliable, and easy to operate
Collaboration and Execution
Work closely with US-based engineers on scoped feature work
Follow established patterns and architectural guidance
Communicate clearly about progress, blockers, and tradeoffs
Contribute to documentation and handoffs when needed
Infrastructure Support (Secondary)
Assist with infrastructure-related tasks as needed
Help deploy tools or support foundational infrastructure work when scoped
Collaborate with infra-focused contractors or engineers as required
What You Bring
3+ years of experience as a software engineer working on production systems
Strong experience building full-stack applications
Proficiency with React, TypeScript, and Node.js
Comfort working within an existing codebase and improving it incrementally
Ability to debug issues, ship fixes, and move features forward independently
Clear written and verbal communication skills
Experience working in product-driven or startup environments
Nice to Have
Experience working on AI-powered or data-heavy products
Familiarity with government, enterprise, or compliance-driven systems
Exposure to infrastructure or deployment workflows
Experience supporting long-lived products, not just greenfield builds
How to Apply
Please include:
Your updated resume
A short 1 to 2 minute Loom video introducing yourself and describing a full-stack product you’ve worked on, including what you owned and shipped
Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be considered.
If you enjoy building real product features, improving existing systems, and contributing to an AI platform that helps organizations actually use their knowledge, this role offers clear scope, strong support, and meaningful impact without chaos.
Application Process Overview
Our comprehensive selection process ensures we find the right fit for both you and our clients:
Initial Application - Submit your application and complete our prequalifying questions
Video Introduction - Record an video introduction to showcase your communication skills and work experience
Role-Specific Assessment - Complete a homework assignment tailored to the position (if applicable)
Recruitment Interview - Initial screening with our talent team
Executive Interview - Meet with senior leadership to discuss role alignment
Client Interview - Final interview with the client team you'd be supporting
Background & Reference Check - Professional reference verification
Job Offer - Successful candidates receive a formal offer to join the team
Each stage is designed to evaluate your fit for the role while giving you insights into our company culture and expectations. We'll keep you informed throughout the process and provide feedback at each step.

title: Azure DevOps Engineer
description_text:
Dentons Business Services EMEA serves as the operational backbone of Dentons, supporting the world’s largest law firm in delivering exceptional service to clients across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa.
As a crucial component of Dentons' global network, our EMEA business services team plays a key role in driving efficiency, innovation, and collaboration.
At Dentons Business Services EMEA, we are committed to excellence in supporting legal professionals with cutting-edge solutions. Our dynamic and diverse team collaborates seamlessly to provide a wide range of services, including finance, IT, human resources, marketing, and more. We pride ourselves on fostering a culture of continuous improvement and adaptability.
Department Overview
The IT Operations & Infrastructure team designs, delivers, and maintains scalable, secure, and modern cloud platforms that underpin the firm’s digital services. Operating across the UK and Warsaw, the team drives cloud transformation, automation, and DevOps adoption across Dentons UK and Middle East LLP.
Role purpose
The Azure DevOps Engineer will support the design, implementation, and optimisation of cloud infrastructure and deployment pipelines on Microsoft Azure, playing a key role in the firm’s cloud migration and technology modernisation strategy.
Accountabilities and Responsibilities
Cloud Architecture, Migration & Modernisation
Working with the wider team, plan and deliver the migration of applications and services from on-premises or legacy environments into Azure, ensuring secure, scalable, and efficient architectures.
Design and implement Azure-based infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) primarily with Terraform.
Partner with architecture and development teams to evolve existing platforms toward cloud-native patterns and DevOps maturity.
Optimise infrastructure for performance, scalability, cost efficiency, and operational resilience.
CI/CD and Automation
Build and maintain automated CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, or similar tools.
Automate cloud provisioning, configuration, and deployment processes across multiple environments.
Embed testing, security validation, and compliance checks within delivery pipelines.
Continuously improving release processes, reducing deployment time and increasing reliability.
Security, Networking & Monitoring
Design and manage secure, high-performance cloud networking — including VNets, NSGs, VPNs, firewalls, ExpressRoute, and Azure AD.
Implement monitoring, observability, and logging using Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, and Application Insights.
Enforce governance and security standards across environments in line with industry best practice.
Technical Skills
Proven experience designing, building, and supporting Microsoft Azure infrastructure (compute, storage, networking, and security).
Strong expertise in Terraform and Infrastructure as Code (IaC) practices.
Hands-on experience with application and data migrations to Azure.
Proficiency in scripting/programming languages such as PowerShell, Python, Bash, or C#.
Solid understanding of networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, VPN, routing, load balancing, firewalls).
Demonstrated ability to design and manage CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps or equivalent tools.
Experience with containerisation and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes, AKS).
Familiarity with monitoring and alerting frameworks in cloud environments.
Personal Attributes
Skilled at bridging technical and business priorities; able to articulate value and trade-offs clearly.
Collaborative mindset — thrives on cross-functional teamwork and knowledge sharing.
Analytical and pragmatic problem solver, comfortable navigating ambiguity in complex environments.
Proactive, adaptable, and outcome-focused, with a passion for modern engineering practices.
Preferred Qualifications and Experience
Microsoft Certified: AZ-400 (DevOps Engineer Expert) and/or AZ-305 (Solutions Architect Expert).
Proven experience leading enterprise-scale cloud migration projects.
Familiarity with hybrid and multi-cloud environments.
Experience with serverless and event-driven architectures.
Knowledge of cloud cost optimisation and performance tuning techniques.
Language Capabilities
We are a truly global law firm and as such, always welcome hearing from those with foreign language capabilities.
Equal Opportunities
Dentons is committed to providing equal opportunities for all. We welcome applications from candidates with disabilities and support those in the workplace who have a disability.
Inclusion, Diversity & Equity
Essential to our success as a global law firm is our ability to attract and retain the best talent from a diverse range of backgrounds. We want a work environment where everyone can reach their potential and we have an inclusive culture which respects individual differences.
We undertake and support a number of internal and external initiatives aimed at increasing diversity within the profession and we encourage all our partners and staff to get involved. We welcome you to learn more about inclusion, diversity and equity at Dentons.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Azure DevOps Engineer will support the design, implementation, and optimization of cloud infrastructure and deployment pipelines on Microsoft Azure. This role is crucial for the firm’s cloud migration and technology modernization strategy.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have proven experience in designing and supporting Microsoft Azure infrastructure and strong expertise in Terraform and Infrastructure as Code practices. Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and cloud provisioning is also essential.

title: Accountant - #34829
description_text:
Our client is a Malta-licensed and EU-regulated online gaming company established in 2013, operating within the global iGaming industry and specializing in high-quality instant casino games. Known as a fast-growing and trusted brand, the company has built a strong international reputation through its commitment to delivering a seamless, enjoyable, and customer-centric gaming experience. Its success is driven by continuous service improvement, strong partnerships across the iGaming ecosystem, and a team of highly skilled professionals dedicated to operational excellence, responsible gaming, and world-class customer support. 
This is a great career opportunity for someone who is looking to join an established international company with a vibrant, friendly, and supportive working environment.
Duties and Responsibilities: 
Perform high-volume reconciliation of payment service provider (PSP) and merchant accounts, accounting for approximately 60– 70% of the role 
Ensure accuracy and completeness of balances by reconciling internal records against external payment providers and resolving discrepancies 
Handle general ledger accounting tasks, including journal entries and month-end close activities 
Support accounts receivable and accounts payable processes, including invoice review and processing
Ensure VAT compliance, including preparation, review, and documentation of VAT-related transactions
Utilize Microsoft Excel extensively for reconciliation, data analysis, and reporting (e.g., pivot tables, formulas, data validation) 
Collaborate with internal teams and external providers to address reconciliation issues and improve process efficiency
Must-have Skills/Qualifications: 
Minimum of 3 years of accounting experience (GAAP/IFRS) 
Strong knowledge of GAAP and IFRS reporting standards 
Experience in EU VAT and general tax compliance is highly advantageous 
Proven ability to perform account reconciliations and manage payment-related operations 
Ability to support audits, ensure regulatory compliance, and guide junior team members 
Proficient in Microsoft Office applications, especially Excel 
Experience with XERO is a plus 
Detail-oriented 
Team player
Employment Type: Independent Contract - Freelance
Schedule: Monday to Friday – 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM Malta Time
Location: Remote
Industry: Malta based Online Gaming Company

title: Logistics Assistant
description_text:
LUXASIA is the leading and largest beauty omnichannel brand-builder of Asia Pacific. Since 1986, it has successfully enabled market entry and brand growth for more than 100 luxury beauty brands, the likes of Albion, Aveda, Bvlgari, Calvin Klein, Creed, Diptyque, Hermes, La Prairie, Maison Francis Kurkdjian, Montblanc, Paco Rabanne, Salvatore Ferragamo, and SK-II. LUXASIA has established Joint Ventures with the likes of LVMH Group, Revlon (for Elizabeth Arden), Puig, Shiseido, and Orveon (for Laura Mercier). The Group's integrated brand-building capabilities include luxury retail, online commerce, consumer marketing & analytics, and supply chain management. LUXASIA is powered by a diverse and dynamic #OneTeam of 2700 talents across a growing footprint of 15 markets. 
Why Join Us? 
At LUXASIA, we believe there is beauty within every talent – that is you. 
We grow you by building your competencies and unleashing your potential. We have curated a vast portfolio of over 100 luxury brands across Asia Pacific, and growing. Your work will enrich the lives of millions of consumers across the region. With us, you get to be an entrepreneur, running the business like it is your very own. We give you the autonomy but not without guidance and genuine care. We are a diverse and inclusive team that is courageously innovative. Together as #OneTeam, we celebrate differences, embrace change, explore new ideas, take risks, fail fast, and drive results. While challenges at work are inevitable, the journey promises to be fulfilling. 
With LUXASIA, an exciting career filled with robust professional growth awaits you. Isn’t that beautiful? 
Perform daily warehouse duties including but not limited to inbound (unstuffing of containers, receiving, sorting, checking, Put-away to location), outbound (labelling, picking, packing, release of cargo) to ensure on-time receiving and accurate delivery of goods according to SOP.
Perform Cycle Count and stock-taking accurately
SAP WMS transactions in relation to warehouse duties
Optimizing warehouse space and ensure bin accuracy. 
Good housekeeping (5S) and safety practice to achieve well-organized and safe-working environment
MHE (material handling equipment) maintenance
Any other duties assigned by Superior

Minimum GCE ‘N’ Level and above
Computer Literacy (Microsoft Excel and Word)
Team player and able to work independently with minimal supervision
Able to work long hours, if required
Attentive and fast learner 
Positive attitude and not afraid of work
Must have hands-on experience in warehousing operations
Able to take work under pressure and with short timeline expectations
SAP knowledge would be an added advantage
Forklift/Reach truck certificate would be an added advantage
Complimentary Goods
Flexi Benefits
Employer of Choice
Do you have what it takes to succeed in a fast-paced and intense environment? Do you thrive on challenges? Do you want to bring innovative ideas to life? Are you keen to abandon the status quo, try new things, embrace failures as lessons, recover fast, yet always pursue excellence? 
If so, you are the one we are looking for. JOIN US and let’s grow together. 
Championing Diversity, Equity and Inclusion 
LUXASIA aspires to build a One Team of talents that reflects the diversity of the communities in our operating markets. LUXASIA is committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all individuals, regardless of their race, colour, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, nationality or ethnic origin, cultural background, social group, marital status, or any other characteristics as provided by law. 
To explore other careers opportunities, visit our careers page @ https://www.luxasia.com/careers/ 
If you have a question for us, please drop us an email here. 
We regret to inform you that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you. 
Recruitment Privacy Notice 
By proceeding with your application, you confirm that you have read LUXASIA's recruitment privacy notice [https://www.luxasia.com/recruitment-privacy-notice/] and consent to the LUXASIA group collecting, processing and disclosing your personal data for purposes specified in the notice. 
Note to staffing agencies 
Please DO NOT contact LUXASIA’s employees or Talent & Excitement (T&E) team in an attempt to present candidates for our roles. LUXASIA has our own panel of appointed agencies that we work with. Any agency who is interested to work with us must obtain prior written approval from LUXASIA’s T&E team before you submit candidates’ resumes, and then only in conjunction with a valid fully executed contract for service and in response to a specific job opening. LUXASIA will not pay a fee to any Agency that does not have such agreement in place. Thank you for your understanding.

title: Mandarin-Speaking Restaurant Manager
description_text:
Apt Resources is looking for a talented and experienced Mandarin-Speaking Restaurant Manager to join our client's team in a prestigious dining establishment. This role is ideal for a passionate hospitality professional who is fluent in Mandarin and has a strong background in managing upscale dining experiences.
As the Restaurant Manager, you will be responsible for overseeing the daily operations of the restaurant, ensuring exceptional service and high-quality food standards. You will lead, motivate, and develop a team of staff, ensuring that all guests receive a warm and welcoming experience reflective of the restaurant’s high standards.
Responsibilities
Manage the daily operations of the restaurant, ensuring smooth and efficient service.
Lead, train, and mentor the restaurant staff to deliver outstanding customer service.
Develop and implement strategies to enhance guest experiences and promote the restaurant offerings.
Monitor food and beverage quality, ensuring compliance with health and safety standards.
Maintain positive relationships with guests, responding to feedback and resolving any issues promptly.
Oversee inventory management, ordering, and cost control to maximize operational efficiency.
Prepare and analyze performance reports, offering insights for improvement.
Collaborate with the culinary team to create and update menus aligned with guest preferences.
Promote the restaurant through marketing initiatives and community engagement.
Ensure adherence to company policies and procedures.
Proven experience as a Restaurant Manager or in a similar role within an upscale dining establishment.
Fluent in Mandarin and English; additional languages are a plus.
Strong knowledge of food and beverage service standards.
Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment.
Exceptional organizational and financial management skills.
Flexibility to work various hours, including weekends and holidays.
A proven track record of enhancing guest satisfaction.
A degree in Hospitality Management or a related field is preferred.
As per market standards
ai_core_responsibilities: The Restaurant Manager will oversee daily operations, ensuring exceptional service and high-quality food standards. They will lead and develop the staff while enhancing guest experiences and managing inventory.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have proven experience as a Restaurant Manager in an upscale dining establishment and be fluent in Mandarin and English. A degree in Hospitality Management or a related field is preferred.

title: Product Process Analyst
description_text:
Be part of something that matters
Australian Payments Plus AP+ is shaping the future of payments in Australia. We bring together the country’s key payment systems to create smarter, safer and more connected experiences for businesses, government and people every day.
Our work spans real time payments, secure bill payments, digital identity, QR payments, open wallets and Australia’s domestic debit network. This is a big moment for payments and you can be part of it.
Life at AP+
We are one team, working towards one clear purpose. We value curiosity, kindness and impact. You will be encouraged to speak up, try new ideas and learn as you go.
We care about your growth, but also about balance. There is space here for flexibility, friendships and fun, alongside meaningful work. Our values guide us every day. Lead with heart. Learn for tomorrow. Live our legacy.
The role
As a Product Process Analyst, you will help our Product teams work better, faster and smarter. You will look at how product work happens from start to finish, spot what is not working well, and help design practical improvements.
You will work closely with product, technology and delivery teams to improve consistency, strengthen governance and support better outcomes. This is a hands-on role where your thinking and ideas will make a real difference.
What you will do
Review product processes end to end and find ways to improve how we work
Identify risks, gaps and inefficiencies and help solve them
Document processes clearly so teams can follow and apply them with confidence
Support the use of product methods, tools and standards
Use data and feedback to guide decisions and track improvements
Help roll out changes through clear communication, training and support
Partner with stakeholders to gather input, test ideas and align on outcomes
Continuously refine processes based on what works and what does not
What you bring
A relevant qualification in business, IT, data, operations or similar, or equivalent experience
Experience improving processes in product, technology or operational environments
Strong stakeholder skills and the ability to explain ideas clearly
Knowledge of process mapping, root cause analysis and basic risk concepts
Confidence using data to support insights and measure results
Certifications in Lean, Six Sigma or BPMN are a plus but not essential
Why join us
You will work on meaningful products that impact millions of Australians. You will be trusted to contribute, improve things and grow your career. And you will do it alongside people who care about the work and each other.
What happens next
If this sounds like you, we would love to hear from you. Apply now and our Talent team will be in touch within two weeks.
If you need support during the application process, please contact recruitment@auspayplus.com.au. You are welcome to share your pronouns at any stage.
Please note AP+ is not partnering with recruitment agencies for this role
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Product Process Analyst, you will review product processes end to end, identify inefficiencies, and help design improvements. You will work closely with product, technology, and delivery teams to enhance consistency and governance.
ai_requirements_summary: A relevant qualification in business, IT, data, operations, or equivalent experience is required. Experience in improving processes in product, technology, or operational environments is also necessary.
linkedin_org_slogan: To unite people and technology to power better experiences​

linkedin_org_description:
We are Australian Payments Plus (AP+).

AP+ operates Australia’s domestic payments infrastructure – including the eftpos debit network, BPAY bill payments, and the NPP (the country’s real-time payments system) - along with ConnectID, a safe and secure way to verify identity.

By partnering with more than 150 organisations we connect banks, financial institutions, retailers, businesses, government agencies and fintechs to make it possible for everyone in Australia to pay, get paid, and prove their identity every day.

We’re shaping the future of payments by enabling innovation, enhancing security, and ensuring the payments system works better for everyone.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer - (017-0545)
description_text:
​​Looking for Filipino (Philippines-based) candidates
Job Role: Senior Full Stack Developer
Work Schedule: AU business hours (approx. 9 AM - 5 PM, Monday to Friday) 
Compensation range: $2,500 - $3,500 AUD / Monthly
Who We Are: At Hunt St, we help Australian companies hire top remote talent in the Philippines. For this role, you will be formally employed through an Employer of Record (EOR) arrangement. We are not an outsourcing agency. All of our roles are 100% remote, so you’ll be able to work from home.
Who The Client Is: The client is a bootstrapped, founder-owned travel technology company based in the south of Sydney, Australia. The business focuses on building a highly specialised digital product for planning multi-day hiking experiences in Europe, combining route design, accommodation options, and transport logistics into a single platform.
The company currently has several live hiking trails across Europe, with a strong pipeline of additional routes in development. There is a clear long-term roadmap to expand into new regions and adjacent adventure travel categories, including bikepacking. The founder is hands-on, customer-focused, product-driven, and looking to scale the platform sustainably with the right technical leadership.
Role Overview: The client is seeking a Senior Software Engineer / Technical Lead to take ownership of the core product and drive its next phase of growth. This is a full-time role suited for a confident, self-directed builder who can ship production-ready features independently and later grow into a leadership role overseeing a small development team.
You will work closely with the founder on product direction and execution, initially as a solo developer and, over time, as the technical lead managing 1–2 additional engineers. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys autonomy, product ownership, and building from a solid foundation rather than maintaining legacy systems.
Key Responsibilities: 
Take full ownership of the existing web application and lead ongoing development and optimisation
Design, build, and ship new product features independently, with a strong focus on reliability and scalability
Maintain and evolve the current backend and frontend architecture
Collaborate closely with the founder to translate product ideas into technical solutions
Lead future development of mobile app functionality and expanded alerting/notification features
Review and improve system performance, security, and maintainability
Introduce best practices for code quality, documentation, and deployment
Eventually oversee and mentor 1–2 developers as the team grows
Provide guidance on data security, access controls, and contractor-level compliance
Required Skills and Qualifications:
Strong experience as a Senior Software Engineer or Technical Lead, preferably in a startup or product-led environment
Backend Proficiency: Expert-level knowledge of Python and AWS Applications.
Frontend Expertise: Strong command of Angular, TypeScript, and CSS.
Cloud Experience: Solid hands-on experience with AWS and serverless architecture.
Autonomy: Ability to work independently with minimal supervision and make sound technical decisions.
Product Mindset: Able to balance speed, quality, and long-term scalability.
AI Integration: Comfortable using AI tools to increase development output and efficiency (as a force multiplier, not a shortcut).
Mindset: Growth-oriented, proactive, and confident in taking ownership of outcomes.
Bonus: Experience with GIS, mapping, or geospatial data is a plus, but not required.
Communication: Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.
Work Arrangement & Expectations:
This is a remote role that will be set up via an Employer of Record (EOR) service.
To ensure alignment and transparency, successful candidates will be expected to:
Disclose any existing ongoing roles or client work
Reflect this engagement on their LinkedIn profile
ai_core_responsibilities: The Senior Full Stack Developer will take full ownership of the existing web application and lead ongoing development and optimization. They will design, build, and ship new product features independently while collaborating closely with the founder on product direction.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have strong experience as a Senior Software Engineer or Technical Lead, preferably in a startup or product-led environment. Proficiency in Python, AWS, Angular, TypeScript, and CSS is required, along with excellent communication skills.

title: Senior Feature Engineer
description_text:
The End-to-End (E2E) Feature and Homologation team brings systems engineering focus and discipline to Zoox mobility-as-a-service deployment and operations. We are systems engineers working with key business stakeholders to define and deliver remarkable product capabilities that span across Vehicle, Autonomy, and Operations segments. We partner with the systems teams from each domain by leveraging their deep technical knowledge, implementation expertise, and validation techniques to deliver a fully verified product capability. The result is E2E ownership of a world-class mobility service.

E2E Feature Engineers are the champions of their feature domains, which cut across Vehicle, Autonomy, and Operations segments of the Zoox mobility service. You will be responsible for the entire product lifecycle for these feature domains and will forge strong relationships with internal stakeholders (Product, Safety, Operations, Legal, etc.) and segment-specific systems engineering departments to deliver: design solutions, systems engineering documentation, multi-quarter capability plans, verification plans, and debug support.
\n

In This Role, You Will: 
Work closely with Product, Safety, Operations, and Legal to define integrated product features. Use data and simulations to support the proposal. Deliver presentations that convey the business need, the problem statement, and the proposed solution.
Lead the cross-functional team to deliver the integrated features, shepherding these features throughout the entire V cycle by working closely with implementation and validation teams.
Create and maintain feature roadmaps spanning: Hardware, Software, Operations, IT, Safety, Manufacturing, and Validation Teams.
Create and maintain high-quality and verifiable feature requirements, decomposing input from stakeholders to drive clarity and precision for systems specifications. 
Create and maintain MBSE models for new features and use the model to identify additional requirements and edge cases.
Lead feature-level triage with cross-functional stakeholders for bugs or reported issues.

Qualifications 
8 years of engineering work experience.
Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Engineering, Computer Science, or Physics.
Demonstrated ability to design complex systems with multiple software and multiple hardware systems. 
Demonstrated ability to deliver strong technical documentation (context diagrams, requirement decomposition, presentations).
Experience with systems simulation.
Strong understanding of hardware and software development processes.
Proven leadership, organization, and communication skills.

Bonus Qualifications 
Experience designing fail-safe and fault-tolerant systems.
Experience with software development and architecture principles
Experience with ECUs, electrical integration, and log analysis
Experience with requirements management tools (Polarion, DOORS, JAMA, etc)
Experience with MBSE tools (Cameo, Magicdraw, Catia Magic, etc)

\n
$187,000 - $225,000 a year
Base Salary Range

There are three major components to compensation for this position: salary, Amazon Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), and Zoox Stock Appreciation Rights. A sign-on bonus may be offered as part of the compensation package. The listed range applies only to the base salary. Compensation will vary based on geographic location and level. Leveling, as well as positioning within a level, is determined by a range of factors, including, but not limited to, a candidate's relevant years of experience, domain knowledge, and interview performance. The salary range listed in this posting is representative of the range of levels Zoox is considering for this position.

Zoox also offers a comprehensive package of benefits, including paid time off (e.g. sick leave, vacation, bereavement), unpaid time off, Zoox Stock Appreciation Rights, Amazon RSUs, health insurance, long-term care insurance, long-term and short-term disability insurance, and life insurance.
\n
ai_core_responsibilities: E2E Feature Engineers are responsible for the entire product lifecycle of feature domains across Vehicle, Autonomy, and Operations segments. They work closely with various stakeholders to define integrated product features and lead cross-functional teams to deliver these features.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have at least 8 years of engineering experience and a bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or Physics. They must demonstrate the ability to design complex systems and deliver strong technical documentation.
